reviews.title: very bad experience
reviews.text:
We just checked into our room and unfortunately, we cannot stay due to serious concerns. The room is not clean—the furniture is damaged, and the air conditioning unit is visibly dusty and in poor condition. In addition, we felt uncomfortable and unsafe upon arrival due to concerning activity around the entrance and lobby.

My husband has heart and lung health issues, and the current room conditions pose a risk to his health. For these reasons, we are requesting an immediate cancellation and refund, despite the prepaid reservation. The condition of the property does not meet basic standards of cleanliness and safety.

We would appreciate your prompt assistance in resolving this matter.

reviews.positives: Absolutely nothing
reviews.negatives: The co place looked shady. We traveled from Maryland and it looked nothing like the pictures I saw when I made the reservations. The bed sheets looked dirty, had crumbs and one of them had mold after asking to get switched.

reviews.title: Horrible

reviews.title: Gross accommodations, biohazard, DO NOT BOOK HERE!
reviews.positives: Price was right but honestly not at all worth the experience.
reviews.negatives: Bed had a MASSIVE bloodstain going down the side like someone had either given birth or had been murdered on it. Room smelled so thickly of cigarettes my partner couldn’t be in there for more than 45 min without gagging. We had to book another hotel and they still haven’t refunded us for the few hours our stuff was in the room. My partner has diligently followed up with the “manager” (who depending on who you talk to either doesn’t exist or is never there) but has never managed to actually speak to him. Ramada’s main helpline is also useless… they keep referring us back to the manager. STAY AWAY AND DO NOT BOOK!

reviews.title: Disgusting
reviews.text:
It was the most unpleasant experience . The room wasn’t cleaned properly! The toilet was dirty. There was hair in the bathtub. You can feel
The springs in the bed. 

The hallways going to the room was dirty and garbage on the floor. The lobby was not clean it kept nicely. 

It was such a bad experience I didn’t even eat at the continental breakfast .  There were empty liquor bottles in the front entrance with garbage ..

What I paid for this room was not even worth it !!!

reviews.title: Board of Health should close facility permanently

reviews.title: Left as quickly as we could.
reviews.text:
The hotel seems to have possibly turned into a residential hotel!? 
It was filthy, run down, has 40 yr old furniture and was not fit to stay in. 

I have stayed at many budget friendly hotels. This is not that. It is just wrecked. I was told later that there is often police activity. 

I never write bad reviews but this is just not acceptable

reviews.title: Won’t be coming here again!
reviews.positives: There weren’t any tables and chairs to sit and enjoy breakfast with your family. We had to make 2-3 trips back and forth until we got our breakfast.
reviews.negatives: The room was very dirty, the mirror and tv screen had stains on it. The bathroom was filled with hair along with the towels. The bedding sheet was all hair and the bed itself had many brown stains on it. We called staff to come and clean it but he brought a rag without any cleaning products to wipe down the mirror and tv screen; then he used a water bottle to wet the rag. The coffee maker was dirty and they forgot to leave us cups plus no jugs for the ice. Everything in that room was dusty and when we talked to the manager his response was: “We are under staff.” Well that’s not my problem. Also the pool closed at 8pm which is super early.

The lobby was filthy, the signs were confusing, there was really nothing good at all about this place!

reviews.title: Could not wait to leave. Didn't sleep under convers
reviews.positives: Location was near American dream and Wayne center for traveling
reviews.negatives: The hotel was very smelly and old, the room was muggy and smelled like dog. Called to request additional blankets was told by staff they didn't know where the keys asked for additional wash clothes was asked to come to the front to get it. Clothes were left in the closet which made feel like the room wasn't properly cleaned prior to me staying

reviews.title: Lot of issues
reviews.text: Internet down for 2 days, staff are not friendly,  out dated rooms with damages on roof and floor, carpet smells, TV never played YouTube, elevator smells bad  and much more issues.

reviews.title: Filthiest hotel I have ever seen.  Should be shut down!
reviews.positives: Nothing. This place is absolutely filthy!
reviews.negatives: Upon checking in and going to our room, we immediately notified the front desk and left.  The room was nasty and filthy.  Stained bedding, food on floor, broken furniture, bugs, rodent poop, etc.  This was uninhabitable and should be closed down by the health department. Homeless shelters are cleaner than this place. The person at the front desk said “I understand “ and agree to authorize a full refund which never happened. I also contacted Wyndham who said someone would be calling me.  That never happened either.  This place is dangerous, filthy, and unhealthy.  Nobody should be allowed to stay in this place.

reviews.negatives: The pool wasn’t open. There was nothing to eat for breakfast besides waffles, cereal, bread or apples. No juice and 75% of the time the few things that they offer was unavailable. Including hot water for my tea.

reviews.title: Do not stay here
reviews.text: Hotel was dirty. Pool and elevator was out of service. Breakfast was super skimpy snd everything looked stale. The room was so old and rundown looking and had a musty odor.  The hallways reeked of dog…There was so much trash inside and outside of the hotel…never staying here again

reviews.title: Awful, terrible service from the one lady at the desk.
reviews.negatives: The lady at the front desk was AWFUL. Someone was BLASTING music outside of my window for 2 hours straight, and didn’t stop until 4 AM. The lady told me she would check it out and did absolutely nothing. Then told me she’s not comfortable with asking the other guest to be quiet.

reviews.title: Very Filthy Hotel With horrible customer service.
reviews.text: I got to my room and immediately saw that it was very filthy, the bet sheets and pillows had stains. The bathroom had very gross things everywhere. The side chair had stains on arms and was ripped. The curtains were the dirtiest things in the room and they were very gross. When I asked to change rooms the customer service ladies were very rude to me and changed me to a room that was worse than the first one. I went back to her with photos of how filthy it was as well and was mad and screaming at me because i was showing her how dirty it was so she switched me to another room that was still dirty dirty but better than the previous too. The price was “breakfast included” but the funny thing is, is that there is no real breakfast meal. The OJ machine was out of order and the coffee was always cold and the toaster machine was dirty. There was just boiled eggs and toast. Not worth the money.

Nothing really the experience was horrible I have actually asked for a refund from your customer service they were supposed to get a hold of me yesterday no one has called me I will be calling back in the morning I am disabled and the disabled room was not clean a handicap shower was not working had duct tape on it the toilet was not cleaning Transit people walking in and out the whole time people living there loud music if I had a choice and have the money to go somewhere else I would have 

I'm hoping I get refunded for the 3 days I was there I left after that one day early and that's supposed to be refunded to meet $99 from the hotel has not came back on my card yet but the other three nights from this horrible experience your customer service reps are supposed to be reaching back out to me can you check on those for me please

Everything and when I say everything I'm meaning literally the cleanliness of the hotel the hotel front the room I am disabled it was a disabled room which was not accessible to me 

Hopefully your customer service rep will be reaching out to me tomorrow about this 

The whole experience was bad I can't believe that Wyndham has allowed this hotel to be called in Windham because it's horrible 

I have pictures I can upload of all of the things there was not even a room number plate at my door everyone else had one but there was not one that said room 130 I guess it had been ripped off or something like that was supposed to be the disabled room handicap accessible there were holes in the curtains candy wrappers on the floor the TV didn't work had to have the people come twice to get it to work 

Again if I could have afforded to go somewhere else I would have left there 

Can you please call me in regards to this there's a report all ready on file

reviews.title: Spend a little more for a better stay and better hotel
reviews.text: Not clean, rude insulting staff and poor unorganized management
reviews.response: We were very disappointed to read of your experience during your stay with us.  While an apology will regrettably not alter the outcome of your experience on this occasion,  we do extend it with all sincerity.  We certainly empathize regarding the points you mentioned in your review, especially issues mentioned regarding staff.  We will look into each issue that you have noted in an attempt to correct and improve our hotel.  -Ramada Fairfield Team

Very expensive for the place to be that dirty. Never got maid service.

reviews.title: One of the worst hotels I have ever stayed in, for all the reasons listed above.
reviews.positives: 1, the location, near major highways and near NYC.
reviews.negatives: 1. the toilet wasn't flushed when I entered the room for the first time. It was really gross.  2. The refrigerator didn't work, it was packed with ice because it needed to be defrosted and so the door didn't close. 3. the hotel was dirty, it seemed like a transient hotel. 4. The staff were unfriendly or distracted. 5. I asked for a room either on the first floor or near and elevator but they gave me neither. They gave me a room on the second floor and the elevator didn't work.

reviews.title: worst hotel stay ever
reviews.text: Worst hotel stay ever.  They do not "refresh" your room.  They actually refuse to give clean towels, empty the garbage or make the bed.  Left a night early because this place is deplorable and was promised a refund by the manager Natalie.  But of course I haven't seen my refund yet... so yeah, on top of horrible service they like to steal your money as well.  DON'T STAT HERE!

The reason I booked this hotel was for the hot tub and pool to find out they do not have a hot tub anymore . Very angry and disappointed will never stay at another Laquinta

reviews.title: Accommodation and accountability should be taken!!!
reviews.positives:
Soon as I got there and entered the hallway to my room a few doors 4 to be exact a woman was calling out “Michael who was unresponsive only to knock on the door identifying who I am am to render assistance seeing dude on floor next to bed naked unresponsive she said she needed no helpi dispatched emergency assistance 911 which was a complete discomfort,
Upon entering my room which was requested accessible one before I arrived it was not one
Toilet was too too low the bathroom didn’t looked or smelled to be cleaned there were stains on the sink and on two rags and towelettes
There was an issue with connection to the WiFi,
Pool hours are ridiculous 10am one hour before check out and then till 8pm sad sad and the pool wasn’t clean nor heated as stated when I asked up on check it.
Disappointing all around the board for the stay or accommodation  stayed at a place not happy with ☹️☹️
reviews.negatives: Staff nor supervisor took my complaint seriously

reviews.title: Very Dirty
reviews.text: it’s not the hotel that’s online. Lobby is dirty halls are dirty right to the room. And that was only the first floor. Second floor was even worse. States it’s a non smoking hotel but on the second floor as soon as you get off the elevator it sure was not a weed smell. I am guessing the smell was from everyone smoking crack. This hotel should be closed down. Breakfast was even funnier it’s through the lobby to a hibachi restaurant that is closed up. The kitchen door was wide open and can see the dirtiest kitchen ever seen. Frozen orange juice that has been frozen over amd over again everything on cut and flattened cardboard boxes. This place is not worth the *** of what I paid. All this place is is for the drug addicts to hide for the weekend. Only seen one employee and you really don’t know he worked there. Not dressed in the right attire just a red shirt on and black jeans with holes in them and worn out sneakers. Stay away from this place.

Continental breakfast is unacceptable. I also need my $50 holding fee to be deposited ASAP in my account.

reviews.text: Room was very dusty, toilet doesn’t flush, vanity sink was clogged, hair on the floor, greasy lamps,toilet seat is worn out, everything is terrible. This is not how someone paying too much for this room must even survie an overnight stay. There was no way for us to back out because we got to the hotel too late at night. They provided a coffeemaker but no water bottles provided to make coffee. We should have been given a credit for all these issues. Sorry to say, I cannot recommend this to anyone😭

reviews.negatives: The place was very uncomfortable and creepy a man walked up on us like he was gonna attack us at the pool

reviews.title: If I could give zero stars I would
reviews.text: Stayed here for a few with family trash from recent guest was left in what should have been a clean room when we arrived lighters left under mattress mind you I’m staying with my four year old old condom wrappers by the bed. If I see it why didn’t the hotel staff cleaning the room. I’m one all for a good time had to blast my tv two days straight because the people next door was getting on if you know what I mean we could here it all including my child and I’m not quite ready to have that conversation with her. When it rains the ceiling tiles fall and they have buckets all over the lobby. People’s hairs left all in the clean towels I’d rather air dry the ac in our room stopped working it took two days for them to check it and not even fix it had to google it myself and got it working by manufacturer reset. People leave their trash all over the halls, they have people hanging around the hotel that seem to not have a place to go and coming in some late evenings it’s worrisome coming in with a child . Their is a side door that stay unlocked and if you pull it from the bottom anyone can get in. The attitudes of the staff are horrible although there was two young ladies who did exceptional I think both their names was Tiffany . When getting breakfast which consisted of waffles boiled eggs cheap brand corn flakes old fruit that looked horrible yogurt and toast and bagels the kitchen staff would literally stand over you. I would bring a bag down and make waffles for my family and gather the fixings one staff told me one per person j had to explain to her that I had two ppl back in the room who were not coming down and that I would be fixing for them as I please because that what my money paid for. Overall you get what you pay for the stay  was a cheaper deal and now we see why if you can afford a little more just pay for it because this is the worst hotel ever

reviews.title: Horrible. We will never be back here.
reviews.positives: Location was good for us
reviews.negatives:
Property is extremely run down. Rooms had a horrible smell.
I requested the room to be cleaned two days in a row, but after being out all day, the rooms were never cleaned. When we spoke them at the front desk, the manager became indignant and threatened us. You should not be offering this place at all.

reviews.title: We didn’t stay! We stayed at a completely different hotel!
reviews.positives: We didn’t like anything about the facility! There was a strong, disgusting smell as we walked down the hallway to our room, food and trash on the floor, and guests screaming and cussing in the lobby and in the hallway when we arrived at 10:30 pm. The pictures on the website are nothing like what the facility looks like and when we walked in our room, we turned around and walked back out and ended up going to a different hotel.

Both ice machines on my floor were broken. We had to go downstairs if we needed ice. and when I asked for extra towels, they told me we couldn’t have extra towels, even though they only gave us two in each room for four people staying in each room.

reviews.title: Found mouse in room
reviews.text: Last night I saw a mouse in the bathroom running under the sink! Then it escaped under the bathroom door. I called the front desk about it & she told me she was going to send someone up to my room to catch the mouse but no one came! Mouse probably came from next door which is being renovated with everything getting ripped out from the walls. Mouse probably came from inside the walls next door! Also had trouble with people playing loud music late at night. The people playing music got into a fight in the hallway with someone complaining about the music! Please by all means stay away from this hotel!!!

We're sorry you were unhappy 
Thanks for letting us know.

reviews.title: Horrible place
reviews.text: They steal deposits and don’t return them. People sleep and squat in parking lot and still roam hotel halls. A front desk person was killed and previous owner was shot a few months back and still there is no security measures to protect guests safety. Roaches and mice also on premises. New owner is also owner of quality inn down the street which is also a shady dive hotel in town. Can’t get anything you need as far as sheets or towels. Breakfast is trash and they stand over you as if your taking to much cereal or too many yogurts.  Not a reputable or descent place by any means. And I could keep going on and on.  Spend the extra money and go somewhere safe and descent!

reviews.title: I would never stay there again!!!!!
reviews.negatives: The Tv did not work, room not cleaned the whole time we were there ( 3 days).  When I called the receptionist to request that our room get cleaned, I was told there were no housekeepers available.  Yet one was right down the hall from my room, which I used my phone to translate because she did not speak any English.  The toliet seat was loose and I requested that maintenance fix it.  Yet no one ever came to fix it.  The freezer in the fridge looked like it hadn't been defrosted in a year.  My Elderly Mom could feel the springs in the mattress which really should be replaced (very uncomfortble).  We were told we would be moved to another room, however we were there to attend a funeral and repass and didn't make it back by 5pm so that didn't take place.  At this point it didn't make sense to move.  There were loud guest in the hallways after midnight and strong smell of marijuana.  The tub looked dirty as well as the carpet in the hallways which should be replaced.

Nothing about switching rooms. Instead of the king suite we originally paid for we winded up in this dingy dirty room, the tub constantly did not drain, & how does a hotel run out of towels and wash cloths ? I wouldn’t recommend staying here

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I have stayed there several times, and the price was reasonable at the beginning of the time, and the service was okay., and the staff is friendly. Now, , the place is under a new ownership and management, the price goes up and the service goes down.  The so- called Continental breakfast, it’s terrible, and the carpet is dirty.  Paying a lot of money to stay there, it’s not worth it.  For me, the only thing is about, the convenience of getting to the highway. That’s it. Not recommend!

reviews.title: Disappointing at best.
reviews.positives: Near my desired location.
reviews.negatives: Property was in major need of updating and routine maintenance.  Breakfast was mostly carbs and had little day-to-day variation.  Noisy, loud voices and car alarms at night. Not easy to access by name - need to use street address.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Staff was super nice. Place was beat up forsure. Old, not so clean

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.positives: Nothing.
reviews.negatives: The cleanliness. The hallway were always filthy, food and crumbs all over the hallway, filthy hall carpet. Filthy hallway walls and doors. The bathtub was black, toilet didn’t flush properly.   The pool was cloudy from guest peeing in the pool I asked how frequent is the pool cleaned and got an unsure answer with a grin. Went back the next day to try the pool. It was in the same condition as the previous day     Combination of pet and marijuana odor. Bed had a huge dent in it.

reviews.title: This Ramada hotel is a place of disaster.
reviews.text: The hotel is being remodeled for both the reception and rooms. The girl at the reception kept me waiting in the same temperature desk area and used swear words when she came to me. She charged me three times the security deposit, two times $50 each from my credit card, and an additional $200 in cash. She refused to send anyone to help when I encountered a Wi-Fi issue after I called the front desk and hung up. I asked for the room to be cleaned the next morning, and I met the hotel team several times during that period, but I was continually told that the room cleaning would come. A non-English speaking lady came, and we could not communicate. I just wanted her to replace the towels and empty the trash bin, nothing else. The floor was very sticky, but I accepted it. The empty small fridge's temperature was set to maximum power, and inside there was a thick icebox when I checked in. I set it to normal temperature and put my food inside, and the next morning, the icebox of the fridge melted into water, which flowed out onto the floor, nearly causing me to slip. A young male hotel staff member came in after I asked for someone to clean up the melted water, and he complained a lot, saying I intended to cause that, which really annoyed me. But later he admitted it was not my fault, it was the room cleaning's fault. Everyone I met in this hotel was so rude and unfriendly. In the evening, after 5 PM, I encountered that non-English speaking room cleaning lady again, and I had to call the front desk asking for someone who spoke English to come. A girl came with a cold expression and directly told me to get out of my room while this non-English speaking lady replaced my towels and emptied the trash bin. I said I needed to continue my work on my laptop and asked her to just do the two simple tasks; I needed to stay in the room to complete my work promptly. They repeatedly refused to replace the towels and empty my trash bin, and we had a tough conversation when the young male staff accused me of deliberately allowing fridge water to flow onto the floor, and asked me to leave immediately. I did not say anything rude or offensive, just said no in a louder voice as I felt treated like a fool for waiting all day for the poor room cleaning. Then I returned to my room, and a southern Asian-looking hotel staff member rushed in, pointing his finger at my face and shouting, "You must leave now," even stopping me from packing up. In the end, this gangster-like staff member gave me 10 minutes to pack up and leave, in a very barbaric and offensive manner. I packed up and left within 10 minutes, and I called 911 for help regarding these hotel staff's threats. I went to the front desk and waited for the police to arrive, and with the police's assistance, I got my remaining three days' payment back. The hotel kept my booking agent, Agoda, waiting for two days to confirm the agreed three days' payment back to me. The entire stay at this Ramada was a complete disaster that made me feel like I was in a savage place. This Ramada by Wyndham Fairfield is completely unlike any Ramada I have stayed at before. It's an exceptional Ramada.

reviews.title: Ms Dar
reviews.positives: My room was clean. The price was good, The breakfast, i had coffee, waffles, and yogurt that I enjoyed. I liked  the dining area. The size of the room is nice. The building and area are nice on outside.
reviews.negatives: No cable TV , the common areas, like hallways, the vending area, wash area looks bad torn down, and unclean. Stained fabric  chairs. Furniture old and chipped.  Surprised at the way, it is kept for a Ramada, worst place I ever stayed at as far as cleanliness and beauty. For the prices a night, I think they can do much better if they care about the business and workers and families.  I didn't see all of the areas, so I could  not comment on fitness or pool, etc. I pray they are better.

reviews.title: Dirty, terrible breakfast
reviews.text: The bathroom was dirty and had other people's hair in the shower. The toilet never stopped flushing unless I wiggled the handle. Every door handle I've ever encountered, I press down to open the door. Not here; the handle had to be pulled up to open the door.  But the biggest letdown was the breakfast. Stale bred, nothing to put on top but peanut butter or plain cream cheese. Hardboiled eggs swimming in water. Very flimsy paper plates and plastic cutlery. The coffee was surprisingly good consider the rest of the offering.

reviews.title: (Should have taken pictures)Although the bed sheets and bathroom towels were clean and fresh, the rest of the room decor
reviews.positives: Location, easy entrance
reviews.negatives: Furniture in room was stained, bed skirt also stained, kinda gross.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I have had good experiences with this site before but unfortunately this time around was a bit different. Due to some cleanliness issues I decided to change rooms. The cleanliness of the second was less than the first, but I did not want to risk losing a room,as I was travelling with a pet.  I do not know if that was the reason for being provided two less than sanitary rooms,but I don't see it as an excuse. I purchased my own cleaning supplies to clean so I could feel comfortable sleeping and showering. I ended up checking out early because I was uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Okay hotel. I'd give it 2.5 out of 5.
reviews.positives: The location was good and the room was decently clean.
reviews.negatives: It was difficult to get extra towels and impossible to get cleaning staff to change the sheets in our room. Also, the garbage pales are so small that they fill up within the first 3 hours. The microwave didn't work. The fridge was so high that it froze our goods until we adjusted the temperature.

reviews.title: Only makes sense if you can get a good deal on price.
reviews.text:
It's' an old facility and a lot of things don't work and needs fixing.
The bed is the best part of the stay, comfy and clean. Everything else could use some updating.
Location is nice and convenient, close to a Target and Restaurants.

reviews.title: The room was OK and the staff was nice. Those are two nice things I could say about my stay.

reviews.text: Room was fine but kind of cold. Had heater on high; still cold.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.positives: Affordable, convenient location, polite and professional staff. Really liked that they have TV with Roku.
reviews.negatives: There were surfaces in our room that weren't wiped down at all, both the sink and tub didn't drain well. The breakfast they offer isn't a full breakfast it's basically coffee and bread but there are several restaurants in the area to order from.

reviews.title: Ummm. Yikes.
reviews.text: Very noisy guests, unresponsive front desk, TV without working remote, grubby restaurant.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.negatives: The remote controls for the TV didn’t have batteries. I had to unplug the microwave to use the coffee maker then switch it back. The tub didn’t drain,I was standing in water up to my ankles.

reviews.title: Coldhearted
reviews.text: I stayed almost a week, on the day of check out, is the day of state of emergency because of the snowstorm. Check out is at 12PM. Around 10AM, I went to the desk to see if there was anyway they could allow me to speak to the manager. Me and my daughter has been displaced since Thanksgiving and have been in and out of hotels. My money wasn't enough for another night, so all I asked if they could help us out with a discount or something, or if they could allow me to keep the room for a few hours till I get more money wired to me,. I was told that the manager was in a meeting and that the will notify me when he's available. I waited 2hrs, to hear "No", there is nothing they could do. It's cold, snowing and me and my daughter had nowhere else to go. I was visibly upset, and asked the girl at the front desk to call the manager (she told the manager that I said I wanted a free night, that's not what I said) . All of a sudden the manager has left the building and I never got to speak to him. I kept asking her begg her to please give me some time, esp so my daughter could finish her virtual classes. The lady eventually called the cops on us. But the irony of it all is the officer who came, felt it was unnecessary  and crazy, so he was nice enough to place is in a different hotel for the night. COVID HAS ALOT OF PEOPLE'S HEARTS QUARANTINED FORREAL. 😪🙏

reviews.title: We slept, the beds were clean and confortable.  I wouldn’t recommend or stay there again.
reviews.positives: Once we found it the property was fine, looked tidy outside but we didn’t hang around outside and wanted to get to our room after a long long drive.
reviews.negatives: The broken flooring in our room, directly in the middle.  The damaged shower curtain rod that drooped leaving both sides of the shower open as the curtain couldn’t stay up.  The rusted bathroom light fixture over the sink, and rusted venting.  The burn mark on the bed duvet, and the welcome message on our tv that read “welcome to Ramada fuckerrrrs”.

reviews.negatives: There was 4 guests. There were not 4 towels and washcloths in the room. There's not enough toiletries. There's no mat to stand on in the shower. Room 255, the shower head is broken. In the morning, the breakfast was cold. The hot water for tea was cold. And why have different entrances if you can't get in by them. I tried to get in by entrance F but couldn't. And if guests needs to know what to do, why not explain how to get in when we check in. And the Wi-Fi sucks.

reviews.title: Average Hotel but good price and location.
reviews.text:
This hotel is OLD. Everything about the facilities are OLD and worn. Only thing that was newer was the sheets, towels and shower curtain.
The vending machines for drinks weren't working or dispensed different cans of beverages.
The breakfast area looks like an old restaurant that was done in all black. There was a waffle maker, cold cereal and packaged oatmeal. Some bagel and bread options with condiments.
I could see lots of food delivery people walking into and around the hotel delivering to the rooms.
The hotel is located near Route 46 in Morris County and other highways and roads.
This was the cheapest in the area.

reviews.title: Not worth $299 for three nights. I will not stay there again.
reviews.positives: It was quit and close to major roads.
reviews.negatives: The carpet in the hall was dirty, and the property needs to be remodeled. In my room, the toilet ran all night the light fixture was broken, the picture in the room was broken, and the one chair in the room was stained. My room door looked like it had been kicked in. My towels were never changed for my entire stay. Even though the sign in the room claims all towels can be changed out every day.

reviews.title: Good price. Needs a makeover!
reviews.positives:
*Room was very clean and smelled fresh.
*Hotel was a great location for the price.
*King size bed was comfortable. 
*Big screen TV had lots of channels. 
*Ample and close parking
reviews.negatives:
*"Free breakfast" consisted of bagels/toast, cereal, or tiny pieces of a waffle. For what the room cost, wasn't even a continental breakfast to us..
*Hotel needs a makeover. Dark hallways, dingy colors, unused facilities with chairs stacked around,  tenants smoking pot and drinking beer outside of the doors where we entered to get to our rooms.

reviews.title: Not bad but not the greatest.
reviews.text:
Positives: Friendly and helpful staff, good location, and excellent price for the stay. Breakfast lounge was clean, on time, and had plenty of things to eat.

Negatives: Pool was closed, treadmill was not working, double beds where okay but one of them had plenty of cat hair which I am allergic to. Staff was quick to change the entire bedding and sheets immediately upon notifying them.

Overall, I rate it a solid 3.5 stars per my view on a 5 star level.
